title: Simplexium
description: All-in-one Minecraft expansion: powerful automation, smart interactions, mining mechanics, and visual tweaks.
body:
Simplexium is an all-in-one expansion that goes far beyond simple Quality of Life. It combines powerful automation, advanced world interactions, dynamic farming, and even visual camera filters into a single, highly configurable mod. ## ✨ Features | Feature | Description | |:----------------------------|:---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------| | **⛏️ Vein Mining** | Break one ore block to harvest the entire vein. Works with modded ores. | | **🪓 Tree Chopping** | Fell whole trees. Now with configurable **Leaf Decay modes** (Instant or Fast Decay). | | **⚔️ Auto-Tool & Weapon** | Automatically swaps to the best tool or weapon. Swaps back after use. | | **📦 Auto-Refill** | Refills hotbar stacks from inventory (and Shulker Boxes!) when they run out. | | **🍗 Auto-Eat** | Automatically eats the best food when hungry or healing. Smart and configurable. | | **🛌 Sleep Heal** | Restores a percentage of missing health when you wake up. Because sleep is healthy! | | **📸 Camera Mode** | Press **F12** for cinematic filters (Warm, Cold, Notch, etc.) and specialized screenshots. | | **🌾 Easy Harvest** | Right-click to harvest and replant. Use a **Hoe** for 3x3 area harvesting and drop bonuses (hand harvesting gives a 25% penalty!). | | **🚪 Smart Doors** | Opens double doors, trapdoors, and fence gates simultaneously. | | **🛡️ Grief Protection** | Optional tweaks: Anti-Trample (crops) and Anti-Enderman Griefing. | | **🪜 Fast Ladders** | Look up to climb faster, look down to slide. | | **🧘 Sit & Lie** | Press **X** to sit or **Z** to lie down. Lying down allows crawling through 1x1 gaps. | | **🖐️ Item Throw** | Hold Drop key (Q) to charge a throw. Throws items farther based on charge. | | **🪵 Anti-Strip** | Prevents accidental log stripping with axes. Hold **Shift** to strip. | | **⚙️ In-game Config** | Tweak all mod settings directly from the in-game mods menu. No restarts required! | ## 📺 Feature Showcase
## ⚙️ Configuration You can tweak almost everything directly in the game! Just go to **Mods -> Simplexium -> Config**. Alternatively, you can edit the `simplexium-common.toml` file. Don't like a specific feature? You can **disable** Vein Mining, Auto-Swap, Drop Penalties, or anything else individually.
